cyberbullying_notice: ⚠️ This message may contain cyberbullying ({reasons}). Admins: {mentions}
warning_notice: ⚠️ Your message was removed because it violated community guidelines ({reasons}). Please keep this space safe and respectful. This is your first notice.
warning_admin_notification_no_admins: ⚠️ Repeated violation ({reasons}). This is warning #{count} for this user.
warning_supervisor_escalation: 🚨 Persistent violations by {mention} ({reasons}) — {count} incidents recorded. Admins: {admin_mentions} — please review and take action.
warning_supervisor_escalation_no_admins: 🚨 Persistent violations ({reasons}) — {count} incidents recorded. Please review and take action.
privacy_notice:
🔒 *Privacy Notice*

Deepfake Guardian moderates content in this group to protect all members. Here is how your data is handled:

• Messages are analysed for harmful content but *never stored*.
• Only metadata (verdict, category scores) is logged — no message text.
• Your user ID is stored as a one-way hash (never in plain text).
• All data is automatically deleted after 30 days.
• You can request deletion of your data at any time.

Type /delete_my_data to submit an erasure request (GDPR Article 17).
delete_my_data_submitted: ✅ Your data deletion request has been submitted (request ID: {request_id}). All stored data associated with your account will be erased within 30 days.
delete_my_data_already_pending: ℹ️ A deletion request is already pending for your account (request ID: {request_id}). Your data will be erased within 30 days.
delete_my_data_error: ❌ Could not submit your deletion request. Please try again later or contact an admin.
